findings.description: PDF page footer content is rendered as inline body text in the HTML, inserting itself between the memo outline (Section I–IV list) and the start of Section I (History/Background), disrupting reading flow.
findings.evidence: In the PDF, 'State of North Carolina | Environmental Quality | Water Resources / 1611 Mail service Center | Raleigh, North Carolina 27699-1611 / 919 707 9000' appears as a page footer at the very bottom of page 1. In the HTML, this same text appears as body content between the report outline (I–IV) and the 'I. History/Background' heading, so a reader encounters footer-style contact information mid-document.
